title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Mythos, its first model in the Mythos class, which achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model supports vision capabilities, long-running tasks, and extended memory for complex applications.
writeup: Better Stack covers Anthropic's release of Claude Mythos, the first model in the Mythos class. The video reports the model topping benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, positioning it for coding workloads. Stated capabilities include vision, support for long-running tasks, and extended memory aimed at complex applications.
